'''鈭歵h-v-t-th''' ('''kathavtethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chack|chack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chack|chack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-v-t-th
|-
! Lemma
| kathavtethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithavtethoko|thithavtethoko]] || [[word:jithavtethoko|jithavtethoko]] || [[word:shithavtethoko|shithavtethoko]] || [[word:kithavtethoko|kithavtethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthavtethoko|thuthuthavtethoko]] || [[word:jujuthavtethoko|jujuthavtethoko]] || [[word:shushuthavtethoko|shushuthavtethoko]] || [[word:kukuthavtethoko|kukuthavtethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthavtethoko|thuthavtethoko]] || [[word:juthavtethoko|juthavtethoko]] || [[word:shuthavtethoko|shuthavtethoko]] || [[word:kuthavtethoko|kuthavtethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthavtethoko|thuthavtethoko]] || [[word:juthavtethoko|juthavtethoko]] || [[word:shuthavtethoko|shuthavtethoko]] || [[word:kuthavtethoko|kuthavtethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethavtethoko|thethavtethoko]] || [[word:jethavtethoko|jethavtethoko]] || [[word:shethavtethoko|shethavtethoko]] || [[word:kethavtethoko|kethavtethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothavtethoko|thothothavtethoko]] || [[word:jojothavtethoko|jojothavtethoko]] || [[word:shoshothavtethoko|shoshothavtethoko]] || [[word:kokothavtethoko|kokothavtethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothavtethoko|thothavtethoko]] || [[word:jothavtethoko|jothavtethoko]] || [[word:shothavtethoko|shothavtethoko]] || [[word:kothavtethoko|kothavtethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothavtethoko|thothavtethoko]] || [[word:jothavtethoko|jothavtethoko]] || [[word:shothavtethoko|shothavtethoko]] || [[word:kothavtethoko|kothavtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thavtethoko|th忙thavtethoko]] || [[word:j忙thavtethoko|j忙thavtethoko]] || [[word:sh忙thavtethoko|sh忙thavtethoko]] || [[word:k忙thavtethoko|k忙thavtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathavtethoko|thathathavtethoko]] || [[word:jajathavtethoko|jajathavtethoko]] || [[word:shashathavtethoko|shashathavtethoko]] || [[word:kakathavtethoko|kakathavtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathavtethoko|thathavtethoko]] || [[word:jathavtethoko|jathavtethoko]] || [[word:shathavtethoko|shathavtethoko]] || [[word:kathavtethoko|kathavtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathavtethoko|thathavtethoko]] || [[word:jathavtethoko|jathavtethoko]] || [[word:shathavtethoko|shathavtethoko]] || [[word:kathavtethoko|kathavtethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathavtethithi|shathavtethithi]] || [[word:shathavtethiji|shathavtethiji]] || [[word:shathavtethishi|shathavtethishi]] || [[word:shathavtethiki|shathavtethiki]]
